title: Variables
description: Learn the basics of variable declaration, initialization, and types in C++.
learningObjectives: Understand the structure of C++ variables
Identify memory sizes for primitive data types

sections.title: What is a Variable?
sections.content: A variable is a named storage location in computer memory that your program can manipulate. In C++, every variable has a specific type, which determines the size and layout of the variable's memory, the range of values that can be stored, and the set of operations that can be applied to it.

sections.title: Variable Declaration and Initialization
